summary: A loose, well‑played show captured in an unknown‑source recording of solid quality.
review: Both reviewers rave about the performance, calling it fun, loose and very well played through the first half and into the second set. No specific complaints about the audio are mentioned, suggesting the recording is at least listenable. Overall the concert is viewed positively despite the lack of detail on source type.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive comments and high star ratings (4‑5) indicate an excellent performance; recording quality is assumed good but not described, leading to a modest overall rating with low confidence due to only two reviews.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not comment on clarity or mix specifics; they thanked the recorder and gave no criticism, implying an acceptable listening experience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Listeners note the show stays solid through the first half and into the second set, with a loose, energetic vibe that keeps the fun level high.
